raw_posts.text: Bitcoin ETF inflow data is drawing fresh attention from traders as liquidity improves across crypto markets.
BTC ETF inflows remain a focus as market participants watch whether demand can stay firm into the US session.
Market desks are discussing Bitcoin ETF inflow momentum, but the causal link to price action is still hard to prove intraday.
Fed officials are watching CPI and labor data closely before the next rate decision, keeping market pricing sensitive.
CPI remains the swing factor for Fed rate cut timing. Bond yields are reacting more to inflation surprises than speeches.
Investors are recalibrating Fed expectations as CPI data keeps inflation risk in the foreground.
Nvidia earnings expectations are under scrutiny as investors assess AI infrastructure demand and margin durability.
NVDA earnings setup is again the center of AI stock debate, with revenue growth and supply constraints in focus.
SEC lawsuit headlines put crypto regulation back in focus as compliance risks remain a key theme for exchanges.
The SEC lawsuit discussion is raising questions about token listings, disclosure practices, and exchange compliance controls.
Treasury yields are moving higher as traders reassess the path for Fed cuts after firmer inflation signals.
The long end of the Treasury curve is again sensitive to CPI surprises and Fed communication.
Oil prices rose as traders watched fresh supply signals and shipping risk around key routes.
Brent and WTI are firm as oil desks point to supply concerns, but demand data still matters.
Tesla shares are in focus after margin commentary and delivery expectations returned to the investor debate.
AI stock watchers are comparing Nvidia and Microsoft capex signals as earnings season shapes sentiment.
ETF flow screens show renewed interest in Bitcoin products, while Ethereum funds are seeing quieter demand.
Ethereum ETF demand remains mixed as crypto funds monitor liquidity and institutional allocation trends.
CFTC action chatter is adding another layer to crypto compliance discussions after recent SEC headlines.
Equity futures are steady but liquidity screens show traders reducing risk into the macro data window.
Gold held near recent highs as yields and dollar moves stayed central to the macro trading setup.
Microsoft and Apple remain part of the mega-cap earnings debate as investors compare AI spending discipline.
A trading halt in a regional bank stock revived questions about liquidity and credit risk, according to market desks.
Regional bank liquidity headlines are back on screens; this needs confirmation before treating it as a broader credit event.
Bitcoin options desks are watching ETF flow persistence, but intraday liquidity still needs confirmation from multiple venues.
Ethereum liquidity screens remain mixed as ETF demand and DeFi activity diverge across market venues.
Treasury curve steepening is back in focus as CPI expectations and Fed rate cut timing drive cross-asset positioning.
Fed speakers are less important than the next CPI print for market pricing; yields remain the cleaner signal today.
ETF flow monitors show Bitcoin products gaining attention while Ethereum funds remain more selective among institutions.
On-chain transfer activity is being cited in Bitcoin ETF discussions, though exchange flow data should be cross-checked.

CPI data offers clues about inflation, while the Fed and Treasury shape policy responses. These signals can influence borrowing costs and market conditions. Not investment advice. #CPI #Fed #Treasury #Macro

市场关注的三大宏观信号——CPI、美联储政策预期与财政部发债节奏——正交织影响资金成本预期。理解它们的互动，有助于看清利率环境的逻辑。通胀数据引导加息终点猜想，联储表态塑造政策路径，国债供给量则传递财政立场。三者共同作用，构成大环境背景。 #CPI #美联储 #美债 #宏观
不构成投资建议。

publish_records.tweet_text:
市场关注的三大宏观信号——CPI、美联储政策预期与财政部发债节奏——正交织影响资金成本预期。理解它们的互动，有助于看清利率环境的逻辑。通胀数据引导加息终点猜想，联储表态塑造政策路径，国债供给量则传递财政立场。三者共同作用，构成大环境背景。 #CPI #美联储 #美债 #宏观
不构成投资建议。
